reviews.review_description: I really loved playing Ninety-Nine (99). The game is still in early access but it is definitely worth it. Will love to see more improvements and can't wait to play the final version of this game. I was big fan of Fruit Ninja so this game is also something new for fans of Fruit Ninja VR.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your support! We're thrilled you enjoyed playing Ninety-Nine (99). We're working hard to bring even more exciting features to the game, and we can't wait to share the final version with you.
